positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed geometric composition featuring a stylized crescent moon embracing a majestic, mythical owl. The design must utilize clean, continuous line art and intricate dot work (stippling) reminiscent of Neo-tribal and sacred geometry tattoo flash. Integrate flowing astronomical elements, such as stellar constellations and wispy nebula patterns, forming a stylized background wreath. The composition must be centered, suitable for a wearable print, maximizing strong contrast between deep midnight navy blue and shimmering antique gold ink. Vector illustration, flat graphic design, high-contrast silhouette, minimal color palette, perfect symmetry, highly intricate.
